name: Curry Dip
directions: Combine all in a bowl and mix thoroughly.
Cover and chill at least 2 hours.
Use for dip with raw vegetables.

similar.name: Marinade for Grilled Meats and or Veggies

name: Piquant Dip
directions: Mix cottage cheese and sour cream.
Stir in remaining ingredients.
Cover and chill 2 hours to blend flavors.
Serve with crackers, chips or vegetables.

name: Caramelized Onion Dip
directions: Saute onion in butter and oil until caramelized (golden brown), about 20 minutes.
Cool and combine the remaining ingredients.
Mix well and chill for at least 1 hour.
Serve with crackers or chips.

similar.name: Marinade for Grilled Meats and or Veggies

name: tomato, cucumber, & onion salad
directions: peel tomatoes and dice them and place in bowl.
peel cucumbers and dice or slice place in bowl.
grate onion place in bowl dice the green onion. put in bowl.
add mayo, salt,& pepper.
mix well and refridgerate 2 hours. serve.

name: Layered Salad
directions: Arrange lettuce at the bottom of the bowl (Preferably a deep dish).
Sprinkle cooked bacon pieces.
Cut and slice all of the vegetables except the carrots.
It's best to grate them.
Place all the vegetables on top of the bacon pieces.
Sprinkle with cheese.
Combine salad dressing and sugar in a separate bowl.
Spread over the salad.
Cover and refrigerate for an hour before serving.
Before you serve toss the salad and add the croutons.

name: Shrimp and Water Chestnut Dip
directions: Coarsely chop shrimp.
Mix all ingredients in medium bowl until well combined.
Refrigerate at least two hours before serving.
Serve with veggie dippers such as bell pepper strips, celery, sugar snap peas, mushrooms, jicama, etc.
Also good served on Wheat Thin crackers.

name: Italian Stuffed Pepperoncinis
directions: Soak the tomatoes in warm water for 20 minutes before mincing.
Blend together the cream cheese, basil, garlic,tomatoes and pepperoni.
Cut the tops off the pepperoncinis and remove the seeds.
Fill with the mixture, cover and refrigerate 1 1/2 hours.
Serve chilled.

similar.name: Marinade for Grilled Meats and or Veggies

name: Marinated  Grilled Sirloin
directions: Cut 1 inch intervals around fat sides of steak and set aside.
In a small fry pan, saute garlic in olive oil until tender.
Place garlic into a medium mixing bowl and add other marinade ingredients.
Mix well.
Pour marinade into a large ziplock bag with steaks.
Marinade at least six hours but I prefer to do them overnight.
Remove steaks from marinade and pat dry, reserving liquid.
Grill steaks for 10-15 minutes on each side or until desired doneness.
Don't forget to occasionally brush with marinade.
While steaks are cooking, heat reserved marinade, mushrooms, green onions and ripe olives.
Place cooked steaks on a meat platter and pour cooked marinade over top.

similar.name: Marinade for Grilled Meats and or Veggies

name: Mediterranean Grilled Shrimp Kabobs
directions: Place skewers in water and let them soak at least 20 minutes or until you are ready to use them.
Rinse and dry shrimp.
Put both oils in resealable plastic bag; add shrimp and toss to coat them with oil.
Add bread crumbs, garlic, parsley, basil, salt and pepper.
Toss shrimp to give them a coating of dry mixture.
(You're wondering how the breading is going to stay adhered to the shrimp, right? Fear not- that's what the next step accomplishes).
Seal bag and refrigerate for 1 hour.
(Do not skip this step).
Thread shrimp on wet skewers.
Grill on HOT grill for 2 minutes per side or until golden.
Do not overcook.

similar.name: Marinade for Grilled Meats and or Veggies

name: Carol's Creamed Cucumbers
directions: Medium slice cucumbers and soak in salt water (6 cups water 2Tbs. salt) this will take the burb out of the cucumbers.
Mix sour cream, sugar, vinegar, salt and pepper until smooth.
Add DRAINED cucumbers.
Slice onion and add, stir until well mixed.
Put in a sealed container and place in fridge.
Stir whenever you think about it.
Takes about 2 days to ferment and get done.
It is normal to see air bubbles from the fermentation process, it's ok, let it do it's thing.
Serve as a side salad, or the sauce can be a topper on potatoes.

name: Cucumber Shrimp Mold
directions: Disolve jello in 1 cup boiling water, add lemon juice, salt and food coloring, set aside.
Beat together the cream cheese, mayonnaise and grated onion until smooth.
Mix this with the jello mixture and blend until smooth.
Stir in the diced cucumbers, shrimp and celery.
Refrigerate.

name: Marinade for Grilled Meats and or Veggies
directions: Mix all ingredients in a container.
Use your choice of chicken, pork, salmon, green squash, onions, mushrooms etc.
Marinade for 2 or more hours.
And grill.
Enjoy!

name: Granny Lil's Spinach Salad
directions: Dressing: Mix all ingredients well and refrigerate for 1 hour.

Salad: Wash and pat dry the spinach, put between paper towels, place in plastic bag and refrigerate Toss spinach with remaining ingredients, adding the mushrooms to taste and the dressing just before serving.

name: Lemon Shrimp Rounds
directions: Remove tails from shrimp, rinse under cold water and pat dry.
Coarsely chop.
Beat softened cream cheese and lemon juice with electric mixer until blended and smooth.
Finely mince white and pale green parts of green onion in food processor.
Stir into cream cheese mixture.
Add shrimp.
Add horseradish.
Refrigerate at least 3 hours.
Can be made a day ahead.
Serve with melba toast.

name: Shrimp Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Chill 4 to 5 hours.
Serve with any crackers.
Recipe Note:Ritz are our favorite.

name: Delicious Coleslaw for Diet
directions: Dice the white cabbage,carrots and onion long and thin.
Mix carrots,cabbage and onion in a big bowl with a wooden spoon.
Boil pasta and chicken separately.
Then add all the ingredients and mix.
Seal it with clingfilm and refrigerate.
